mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_cmm_code a WHERE code_group = 'plan_tag_code_group'
AND etc1 = #{searchCateGroupSp}
SELECT b.code, b.code_name, b.order_no FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE a.cate_id =#{searchCateCode} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_cmm_code (code_group, code, code_name, code_desc, order_no, etc1, use_yn, create_id, modified_id) VALUES( #{codeGroup}, #{code}, #{codeName}, #{codeDesc}, #{orderNo}, #{etc1}, #{useYn}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} );

UPDATE tb_cmm_code SET modified_id = #{modifiedId},
use_yn = #{useYn},
order_no = #{orderNo},
code_name = #{codeName}, code_desc = #{codeName},
etc1 = #{etc1},
modified_date = NOW() WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup} AND code=#{code}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_list SET modified_id=#{modifiedId}, plan_tag1=#{planTag1}, plan_tag2=#{planTag2}, plan_tag3=#{planTag3}, plan_tag4=#{planTag4}, plan_tag5=#{planTag5}, modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id};
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CODE) FROM tb_cmm_code WHERE code_group = 'plan_tag_code'
SELECT MAX(CODE) FROM tb_cmm_code WHERE code_group = 'plan_tag_code_group'
